news.title: WSJ Dollar Index Rises 0.08% to 97.17
news.summary: 1300 GMT – Interest-rate differentials have moved against the dollar,  Societe Generale’s  Kit Juckes says in a note.  “The market now prices a 90% chance of an European Central Bank [rate] hike in September (with a further adjustment expected after this week’s meeting) and a 70% chance of a Federal Reserve hike.”  The ECB is more sensitive to oil prices due to its primary mandate to maintain price stability.
